cases.notes: All seven PRD capabilities map to stories or ACs, with no invented work; the not-found error and persistence/passthrough cross-cutting concerns are correctly placed as constitution invariants in Decisions rather than as standalone Features, and ACs stay user-observable while implementation choices (Python, storage location) are confined to the Decisions block.

All five PRD core capabilities map cleanly to exactly one BREAKDOWN story each with no inventions; the two cross-cutting concerns (auth, day boundary) are correctly kept as shared invariants in Decisions rather than promoted to Features, and ACs stay user-observable without leaking implementation detail.
